lines.speaker: Barmaid
lines.text: Welcome to the Laughing Miner pub, human traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who is that man walking around outside?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I mean the dwarf, the one with the sign.

lines.speaker: Barmaid
lines.text: Oh, him. Yes, we employ him to advertise our pub, he's the cheapest labour we could find. We don't have a lot of money to spare you know, we pay him in beer.

lines.speaker: Barmaid
lines.text: I told you, he's cheap. He couldn't get any other work since the Red Axe fired him. Been drinking ever since.

lines.speaker: Barmaid
lines.text: I'm not quite sure, I think he kept wearing the wrong coloured cap all the time. They don't much like it if you don't wear your red uniform into work.

lines.speaker: Barmaid
lines.text: The Red Axe will fire you for just about anything if they want to.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have 2 coins on me.

lines.speaker: Barmaid
lines.text: I can make you a stew for 20 gold coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have 20 coins on me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a Kelda stout please.

lines.speaker: Barmaid
lines.text: Sorry, we've stopped serving those. The seeds were too hard to get.

lines.speaker: Barmaid
lines.text: They're quite hard to come by, and I believe you've already got one.

lines.speaker: Barmaid
lines.text: Here, I found a little left over Kelda stout, just enough for a glass. Take it.

lines.speaker: Barmaid
lines.text: I don't think I'll be able to sell it to anyone.
